attacking_style: Insufficient data to determine clear attacking pattern. Positioned as GC asset rather than aggressive attacker based on available observations.
team_tactics: Team commits significant resources with multiple riders protecting him in critical splits, willing to sacrifice pure sprinters (Jakobsen) to prioritize his GC ambitions over stage hunting.
terrain_preference: Protected through climbs as GC asset, suggesting capability on moderate climbing terrain. Vulnerable in technical sprint finishes with tight chicanes where positioning can be compromised.
vulnerability: Susceptible to aggressive lateral movement in technical sprint finishes; can be squeezed wide and lose positioning in confined spaces with narrow infrastructure.
key_patterns: Team deploys 4+ riders to protect in decisive splits, high resource commitment (2 observations)
Prioritized over dedicated sprinters when GC opportunities emerge, clear team hierarchy (2 observations)
Struggles with spatial awareness in technical finishes, positioning compromised under pressure (1 observation)
form_trajectory: neutral: Limited timespan (one month) shows GC-focused role emerging, but insufficient recent data for trajectory assessment
